hero.sub1: Real-time pair programming. Sandboxed execution. AI‑powered feedback.
hero.sub2: Practice like it's the real thing.

features.heading: Built for engineers, by engineers.
features.sub: Everything you need to simulate a real technical interview.
features.pairProgrammingDesc: Edit the same file at the same time. Both cursors work — no conflicts, no lag.
features.liveExecutionDesc: Hit run. See your code execute against real test cases in seconds — not a simulation.
features.aiFeedbackDesc: Get told where your solution is slow, what edge cases you missed, and how to fix it.

howItWorks.heading: Interview prep in three steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: One click creates an isolated session with a shared editor and voice channel.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Write code side-by-side. You both see every keystroke instantly — no copy-paste, no screen sharing.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Execute tests, get AI analysis, and replay sessions to improve.

demo.heading: Watch it come together.
demo.sub: A complete interview session — from problem to passing tests — in seconds.

cta.sub: Join your peers and practice interviews the way they actually happen — together.
